figures.caption: Table 1: Participant-level and group-level performance. Distances are in mm and Cov5 is in %.

Fig. 2: User study setup: (A) Mixed-reality capture, (B) HMD, (C) tracked stylus, (D) phantom (marker + markerless), (E) close-up mic/camera.
Fig. 3: (a) TRE for marker vs. markerless registration. (b) Margin relocalization error for verbal vs. AR guidance.
